item.title: All because he got the “wrong” flowers…
item.description: A small misunderstanding over something as simple as flowers turns into a relationship conflict that raises questions about expectations and communication.

media:content.media:title: All because he got the “wrong” flowers…
media:content.media:description: A small misunderstanding over something as simple as flowers turns into a relationship conflict that raises questions about expectations and communication.

item.title: Women don’t understand good men
item.description: Many men feel overlooked in modern dating as their genuine intentions and efforts go unrecognized.

media:content.media:title: Women don’t understand good men
media:content.media:description: Many men feel overlooked in modern dating as their genuine intentions and efforts go unrecognized.

item.title: I just know there’s a good man sitting in her friendzone
item.description: Somewhere in her friendzone there is probably a good man she keeps overlooking.

media:content.media:title: I just know there’s a good man sitting in her friendzone
media:content.media:description: Somewhere in her friendzone there is probably a good man she keeps overlooking.

item.title: How would you guys react?
item.description: What would your reaction be if you were put in this situation?

media:content.media:title: How would you guys react?
media:content.media:description: What would your reaction be if you were put in this situation?

item.title: This difference is frustrating to men!
item.description: This difference in perspective is something that often frustrates men in relationships.

media:content.media:title: This difference is frustrating to men!
media:content.media:description: This difference in perspective is something that often frustrates men in relationships.

item.title: Men don't want to be a burden!
item.description: Many men stay silent because they never want to feel like a burden.

media:content.media:title: Men don't want to be a burden!
media:content.media:description: Many men stay silent because they never want to feel like a burden.

item.title: Men don’t want to waste their time…
item.description: Most men simply do not want to invest time where they are not valued.

media:content.media:title: Men don’t want to waste their time…
media:content.media:description: Most men simply do not want to invest time where they are not valued.

item.title: Pay attention to how she acts after you’re vulnerable…
item.description: Pay close attention to how she reacts once you finally open up.

media:content.media:title: Pay attention to how she acts after you’re vulnerable…
media:content.media:description: Pay close attention to how she reacts once you finally open up.

item.title: How to fumble a good man 101…
item.description: A quick lesson on how someone can lose a genuinely good man.

media:content.media:title: How to fumble a good man 101…

item.title: Would you guys be okay with this?!
item.description: Would you be okay with this situation or would it be a deal breaker?

media:content.media:description: Would you be okay with this situation or would it be a deal breaker?

item.title: He WON…
item.description: Sometimes staying calm and confident is exactly how he ends up winning.

item.title: Why some men are single…
item.description: Sometimes the reasons why some men are single are not what people assume.

item.title: These are blue collar men…
item.description: These blue collar men show what hard work and dedication really look like.
